artPrompt: A cluster of shadowed goblin figures gathered on a fog-wrapped wharf after dark, each clutching a single card close, a lone lantern throwing a small pool of amber across wet planks and black water; the harbor dissolves into smoky brown mist, posture taut with unspoken outcomes, the tense rendezvous softened into a dreamy, melancholic hush, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Midnight Meeting at the Docks
text:
Each player draws a card. For each opponent who drew, you create a Favor token. Everybody came to the meeting. Not everybody is leaving the meeting.
Then target opponent of your choice loses 2 life. There were words. There is now a body of water nearby.
flavorText: The agenda had one item, and that item had two outcomes.
